name: ENDOCARDIAL FIBROELASTOSIS
definition: diffuse endocardial thickening of LV + LA ← deposition of collagen + elastic tissue

demographics.Etiology: secretion of 5-hydroxytryptamine by tumor cells metastatic to liver → deposition
demographics.Prevalence: in up to 60% of patients with carcinoid syndrome
demographics.Location: both tricuspid and pulmonary valve leaflets + corresponding subvalvular

dominant_finding: enlarged LV (= dilatation of hypertrophied LV) ← mitral regurgitation
distribution: both tricuspid and pulmonary valve leaflets + corresponding subvalvular
discriminating_features: enlarged LV (= dilatation of hypertrophied LV) ← mitral regurgitation

general: enlarged LV (= dilatation of hypertrophied LV) ← mitral regurgitation
LLL atelectasis ← compression of left lower lobe bronchus by enlarged LA
thickening of valve leaflets and cusps → eventually retracted + shortened + immobile

clinical.Prognosis: mortality almost 100% by 2 years of age
